title: Get AZM Intraday by Date
description:
This endpoint retrieves the active zone minute (AZM) intraday time series data for a specific date or 24 hour period. Intraday support can extend the detail-level response to include 1min, 5min and 15min for Active Zone Minutes.

3rd-party developers who want access to retrieve other Fitbit users’ Intraday data through the “Client” or “Server” application type should submit a request by filling out this form . A Fitbit developer’s personal Intraday data is automatically available through the “Personal” application type. You do not need to submit a request.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The date in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today .

parameters.name: detail-level
parameters.description: Number of data points to include. Supported: 1min | 5min | 15min

parameters.name: start-time
parameters.description: The time in the format HH:mm .

parameters.name: end-time
parameters.description: The time in the format HH:mm .

response_fields.name: minutes : minute
response_fields.description: The dateTime when the AZM value was recorded.

response_fields.name: minutes : value : fatBurnActiveZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: The number of active zone minutes in the fat burn heart rate zone earned during the previous iteration. 1 fat burn minute = 1 fat burn active zone minute.

response_fields.name: minutes : value : cardioActiveZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: The number of active zone minutes in the cardio heart rate zone earned during the previous iteration. 1 cardio minute = 2 cardio active zone minute.

response_fields.name: minutes : value : peakActiveZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: The number of active zone minutes in the peak heart rate zone earned during the previous iteration. 1 peak minute = 2 peak active zone minute.

response_fields.name: minutes : value : activeZoneMinutes
response_fields.description: Total count of active zone minutes earned during the previous iteration.
